label: Individual ID
description: Unique individual identifier (per round; NO panel key).

label: DHS round
description: Ethiopia DHS survey round.

label: District ID
description: District (woreda) of the respondent.

label: Region ID
description: Region code.

label: Treated dummy
description: 1 if the district ever hosts a park.

label: Treatment indicator
description: 1 if district treated AND round >= open round.

label: Event phase
description: Round position relative to opening {-3..+1} (NaN for controls).

label: Sex
description: 0 = male, 1 = female.
notes: Women-only outcomes are NaN for men.

label: Age
description: Respondent age.

label: Age squared
description: Square of age.

label: Non-agricultural employment
description: 1 if employed outside agriculture.
how_created: Clipped LPM, per-sex tau (female precise, male noisy).

label: Decision-making power
description: 1 if the woman has the final say on key household decisions (women only).

label: Savings account
description: 1 if the woman owns a savings account (women only).

label: DV acceptance
description: 1 if the woman accepts domestic violence under any of 5 conditions (women only).

label: DV: going out
description: DV justified for going out without telling husband (women only).

label: DV: neglecting kids
description: DV justified for neglecting the children (women only).

label: DV: arguing
description: DV justified for arguing with husband (women only).

label: DV: refusing sex
description: DV justified for refusing sex (women only).

label: DV: burning food
description: DV justified for burning the food (women only).

label: Household size
description: Household size.

label: Age of head
description: Age of the household head.

label: Survey weight
description: DHS sampling weight.
